styleProfiles.name: cinematic
styleProfiles.label: Cinematic
styleProfiles.style: cinematic, ultra detailed, natural lighting, volumetric atmosphere, dynamic camera, shallow depth of field, filmic color grade

styleProfiles.name: documentary
styleProfiles.label: Documentary
styleProfiles.style: documentary realism, handheld camera, available light, authentic colors, subtle motion, observational framing

styleProfiles.name: stylized
styleProfiles.label: Stylized
styleProfiles.style: stylized, bold colors, high contrast, expressive lighting, artistic composition, graphic clarity

styleProfiles.name: commercial
styleProfiles.label: Commercial
styleProfiles.style: premium commercial look, clean highlights, controlled reflections, product-safe framing, polished grade

styleProfiles.name: noir
styleProfiles.label: Noir
styleProfiles.style: film noir, low-key lighting, deep shadows, rain-slick surfaces, moody contrast, mystery tone

styleProfiles.name: music-video
styleProfiles.label: Music video
styleProfiles.style: music video energy, performance and B-roll, beat-synced cuts, hero lighting on chorus, polished grade

styleProfiles.name: anime
styleProfiles.label: Anime
styleProfiles.style: anime style, clean line art, saturated accents, expressive motion, readable silhouettes

styleProfiles.name: hyperreal
styleProfiles.label: Hyperreal
styleProfiles.style: hyperreal detail, sharp textures, controlled HDR, premium commercial finish

topics: a courier sprinting through a crowded night market
a spacecraft docking in a silent orbit
a chef plating under a single spotlight
a dancer alone in an empty warehouse
a storm rolling over a coastal lighthouse
a child releasing lanterns at dusk

examplePrompts.text: Imagine a cyberpunk close-up shot capturing the upper body of a character with an melancholic demeanor. The subject is gesturing with one hand while shaking the head
A sleek red sports car speeds through a winding mountain road

A group of fluffy baby chicks huddle together under a heat lamp in a rustic barn. Their soft peeping fills the air as they nudge each other for warmth. The wooden floor beneath them is strewn with straw
A black-and-white film of a pianist playing in an empty theater. His fingers move deftly across the keys
A wave of glowing steam crashes into a stone wall
A tomato surfing on a piece of lettuce down a waterfall of ranch dressing
A cheerful panda on a bustling city street
A shimmering
A stylish woman walks down a Tokyo street filled with warm glowing neon and animated city signage. She wears a black leather jacket
Several giant wooly mammoths approach treading through a snowy meadow
A movie trailer featuring the adventures of the 30 year old space man wearing a red wool knitted motorcycle helmet
Drone view of waves crashing against the rugged cliffs along Big Sur's garay point beach. The crashing blue waters create white-tipped waves
Animated scene features a close-up of a short fluffy monster kneeling beside a melting red candle. The art style is 3D and realistic
A gorgeously rendered papercraft world of a coral reef
This close-up shot of a Victoria crowned pigeon showcases its striking blue plumage and red chest. Its crest is made of delicate
Photorealistic closeup video of two pirate ships battling each other as they sail inside a cup of coffee.
A young man at his 20s is sitting on a piece of cloud in the sky
Historical footage of California during the gold rush.
A close up view of a glass sphere that has a zen garden within it. There is a small dwarf in the sphere who is raking the zen garden and creating patterns in the sand.
Extreme close up of a 24 year old woman's eye blinking
A cartoon kangaroo disco dances.
A beautiful homemade video showing the people of Lagos
A petri dish with a bamboo forest growing within it that has tiny red pandas running around.
The camera rotates around a large stack of vintage televisions all showing different programs — 1950s sci-fi movies

shotTypes.Extreme wide shot: extreme wide shot, environment-focused, small subject, establishing scale.
shotTypes.Wide shot: wide shot, full body, environment visible, balanced framing.
shotTypes.Medium shot: medium shot, waist-up, focus on subject, natural perspective.
shotTypes.Close-up: close-up, strong focus on face or detail, shallow depth of field.
shotTypes.Extreme close-up: extreme close-up, tiny detail, intense focus.
shotTypes.POV: POV shot, immersive perspective, handheld motion.
shotTypes.Over-the-shoulder: over-the-shoulder shot, subject framed from behind another person.

lightingSetups.3-point lighting: soft key light 45°, gentle fill, subtle rim light, natural contrast.
lightingSetups.High-contrast noir: hard key light, deep shadows, minimal fill, strong rim light.
lightingSetups.Soft cinematic: large soft key, soft fill, subtle back light, low contrast.
lightingSetups.Neon reflections: neon practicals, reflections on wet surfaces, rim light, volumetric fog.
lightingSetups.Stage/Arena: strong spotlights, backlights, haze, moving beams, high contrast.

colorPipelines.Kodak 2383: Kodak 2383 film emulation, soft halation, fine grain, warm highlights, cool shadows.
colorPipelines.Fuji Eterna: Fuji Eterna profile, low contrast, natural skin tones, soft colors.
colorPipelines.Teal-Orange: teal-orange grade, strong color separation, cinematic contrast.
colorPipelines.Log + LUT: log gamma capture, film LUT, gentle contrast curve.

renderBackends.label: Export only
renderBackends.description: Download job JSON — paste the prompt into Sora, Runway, or Kling. Does not create MP4.

renderBackends.label: Local GPU render
renderBackends.description: Render MP4 on your GPU — Wan 2.1 (Diffusers) by default, or Open-Sora in Director → Advanced

localRenderEngines.label: Wan 2.1 (Diffusers)
localRenderEngines.description: Native CUDA on Windows — no WSL or Open-Sora folder required

localRenderEngines.label: Open-Sora 2.0
localRenderEngines.description: ColossalAI pipeline — needs clone + WSL on Windows
